rows.label: qev065203_MSG0001
rows.name:
Yo, what's up [ST:playername ]! Did you bring me some
talk that'll make me some money?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065203_JNK0010
rows.name: Consult

rows.label: qev065203_SEL0011
rows.name: Consult with him about Fortun.

rows.label: qev065203_JNK0020
rows.name: Deny

rows.label: qev065203_SEL0021
rows.name:
Tell him you don't have any
particular talk like that.

rows.label: qev065203_MSG0002
rows.name:
What... An ancient metallic lifeform,
you say? That doesn't sound like
it'll make any money, but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065203_MSG0003
rows.name:
...That sounds incredibly interesting! Hehe,
it's been a while since I've had a research
subject that tickled my intellectual curiosity.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065203_MSG0004
rows.name:
Alright! Bring it here immediately.
I, the great scientist Doctor B,
shall take a look at it personally![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065203_MSG0005
rows.name:
Well, that's a shame. My company is always
waiting for profitable talks. If you have
a good one, bring it to me anytime.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065203_MSG0006
rows.name:
...I see, this is interesting. It is true
that the metal itself has constructed a system
and created what you could call a will.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065203_MSG0007
rows.name:
Hm... You can't even see something
like this in the future very often.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065203_MSG0008
rows.name:
Who is this beast...? No data? No... it
shouldn't be possible for there to be
information in this universe that I do not know...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065203_MSG0009
rows.name:
Kuh... However, remember this. I am Fortun,
the king who governs the galaxy's knowledge
since the distant ancient times...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065203_MSG0010
rows.name:
My soul is not something that
a filthy beast may touch.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065203_MSG0011
rows.name:
Hmph, what a bossy fellow. How
about it? Shall we just modify
this thing's personality entirely?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065203_MSG0012
rows.name:
If we change the personality AI acting as the
protection into a good person, it will start blabbing
everything you want to know on its own, won't it?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065203_JNK0030
rows.name: Affirm

rows.label: qev065203_SEL0031
rows.name: Accept Doctor B's proposal.

rows.label: qev065203_JNK0040
rows.name: Question

rows.label: qev065203_SEL0041
rows.name: Ask if such a thing is possible.

rows.label: qev065203_MSG0013
rows.name:
Then bring me a Resonating
Madonater and an Octopus Board.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065203_MSG0014
rows.name:
If you have those, I'll make
this thing docile in no time.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065203_MSG0015
rows.name:
What, are you doubting me now? There
is nothing impossible for Doctor B.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065203_MSG0016
rows.name:
If you bring me a Resonating Madonater
and an Octopus Board, I'll make
this thing docile in no time.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065203_MSG0017
rows.name:
Hehe, if you speak so arrogantly
to me, I'll make you realize
what kind of fate awaits you![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065203_MSG0018
rows.name:
Bring me a Resonating Madonater and
an Octopus Board. I'll modify it
into an exceptionally good person.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065203_MSG0019
rows.name:
You've finally returned!
Man, that was close.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065203_MSG0020
rows.name:
I was getting really fed up
with it, and was about to
smash this thing to pieces.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065203_MSG0021
rows.name:
Hurry up and give me the
materials. I have to remake
this thing as soon as possible.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065203_MSG0022
rows.name: Alright, then let's get right to it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065203_MSG0023
rows.name:
...Fortun, prepare yourself! You
are going to be reborn right now![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065203_MSG0024
rows.name:
Stop this... Aaah... Do
not stirrr up my soul...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065203_MSG0025
rows.name:
I ammm Fortun, the king of the Definians
who governs the galaxy's knowledge since
the disstant ancient times...?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065203_MSG0026
rows.name: Uaaah... Aaaaah!! Iyaaaaaaaaah![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065203_MSG0028
rows.name:
It is complete! Here you go, Fortun.
Try introducing yourself a little.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065203_MSG0029
rows.name:
I am Lady Fortun, the king of the Definians who
governs the galaxy's knowledge since the distant
ancient times! Ei! Bow down before me, you fools![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065203_MSG0030
rows.name:
Oh my... It didn't change much, did
it? This one is quite stubborn.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065203_MSG0031
rows.name:
Hehe! I am not someone who can be
easily modified by a mere beast!
Stupid, stupid! It is your loss![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065203_MSG0032
rows.name:
...However, Mother's AI seems much lighter
than it was before. With this, she'll
crack under a simple interrogation.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065203_MSG0033
rows.name:
What nonsense! I will absolutely
never tell you the passcode![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065203_MSG0034
rows.name:
...Now, [ST:playername ]! Kill everyone present here
and take me to my daughters' location![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065203_JNK0050
rows.name: Tickle

rows.label: qev065203_SEL0051
rows.name: Try tickling Fortun's body.

rows.label: qev065203_JNK0060
rows.name: Poke

rows.label: qev065203_SEL0061
rows.name: Try poking Fortun's body.

rows.label: qev065203_MSG0035
rows.name:
Wh-What are you doing!! Stop
it... It tickles, doesn't it!
Ahahaha! Hahahahahahahahaha![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065203_MSG0036
rows.name:
Wh-What are you doing!! Ouch... ouch,
ouch, ouch! Guh! You barbarians![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065203_MSG0037
rows.name:
I under... I understand! I will
tell you the passcode, so cease
your violent actions immediately![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065203_MSG0038
rows.name:
...Alright! Now, if we defeat the three
sisters who lead everyone into madness,
the organization will collapse.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065203_MSG0039
rows.name:
They should possess combat
prowess that someone like me
couldn't even hold a candle to...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065203_MSG0040
rows.name:
Please, be careful. Their stronghold
is on the Black Steel Continent.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065203_MSG0041
rows.name:
It seems you have some complicated
circumstances, but you can do as
you please from here on.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065203_MSG0042
rows.name:
I am busy with business, after all. I don't have
the free time to meddle in world peace. Well, it
was quite an enjoyable experimental subject.[ST:wait ]
